As Saturn enters the India third house following prediction is given for the air line industry.
The air travel will jump up in a big way. Number of people will be traveling will double
and even quadruple in less than three years time. The industry on the whole will see more
than 40 % -30% growths. Number of airlines and air crafts will increase substantially.There
will be day in next 5 years were many people in India who belong middle class will like air
travel to train travel.
Local travel using flights will increase. The secondary hub areas like Cochin Banglore will
increase in there air traffic in big way. Air port expansion will go smoothly. The
privatization of the air port will take a back seat till left is supporting as such infra structure
for air port will increase. The shoddy air India will go through a revamp. Number of
international cariers coming to India and number of destination will increase.-TRUE
